data.body:
=== SESSION HANDOFF (2026-06-14 autonomous loop) — E5..E6.5a + E8b1 DONE ===
Local main @ d1f41a64, clean tree. NOT pushed (push awaits user direction). Full suite 1805 passed/0 failed at the E6.5a milestone; E8-batch-1 11 tests green.

DONE (committed, each tested; per-cluster child tickets closed): E5 bridge-status/purge-bridge (fd94e4b1); E5b reconciler rewire off shims + sys.executable launch (fb1b7fa7) — LIVE-DIG probe PASSED; E5c delete bare event_append.py (c7b36bd0); E6a rebar-pkg off shims (b3cbfe6a); E6.5a 1-6 sever ALL in-process->engine subprocess deps (11c0784e..656958a1) — bridge-probe LIVE-DIG PASSED; E8 batch 1 = 4 GAP suites -> pytest (f7c6f5d8).

MILESTONE: the in-process CLI no longer touches the bash dispatcher (rebar._run + _cli._passthrough are DEAD; all 45 subcommands in-process). E7 (delete the bash engine) is unblocked.

RESUME: E8 batch 2 (6 remaining GAP suites: has-tag detected_by, reconciler scratch-exclude, symlink-resolve, init-idempotent, transition-open-children correctness[bounded], id-collision[bounded integration]) -> E7 ATOMIC cutover (delete dispatcher+36 .sh+dispatcher-only .py+5 shims+all .sh suites+collector+15 parity tests+machinery; KEEP rebar_reconciler/+jira-capability-probe.py+wordlist+engine_dir/engine_env/wordlist_path) -> E9 docs+close adult-oxide-slave/nervy-hold-dip. Full grounded plan + exact delete/keep list in docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md. opus-review the E7 cutover before/after. NB: don't git-commit during a background full-suite run (trips _no_repo_commits guard). E8-batch-2 worker crashed mid-draft (socket); redo fresh.
